author: anon-ab6221f8
content:
Plan — Phase 5.2 scope and design:

Reuses sentinel/notify.rs's Slack Block Kit + generic JSON payload patterns, adapted for the dashboard's alert shape (kind/severity/subject_ref/detail/project_slug). Uses reqwest (already a dep) rather than shelling to curl.

Backend:
1. New crosslink/src/dashboard/webhook.rs module — WebhookPayload (Slack + generic variants), is_slack_url detection (hooks.slack.com), dispatch via reqwest, URL masking for logs.
2. Config persistence: webhook URL list JSON-encoded in dashboard.db 'config' table under key 'webhook.urls'.
3. alerts_db::sync_alerts_for_project return type extended to include the list of newly-opened DerivedAlert entries (not just counts) so poll.rs can dispatch.
4. Wire into poll.rs: after reconcile, if URLs configured, spawn task dispatching each new alert to each URL. Fire-and-forget with tracing::warn on failure.
5. REST endpoints /api/v1/dashboard/webhooks — GET (list) + PUT (replace full list).
6. Unit/axum-oneshot tests: payload shape, is_slack_url, dispatch_ok/err via mock server (tokio+hyper), round-trip GET/PUT, 400 without DB.

Frontend:
1. /settings/webhooks page — list stored URLs, add/remove, save.
2. API hooks (useWebhookConfig + useSetWebhookConfig).
3. vitest coverage.

Deferred: email (SMTP is too much state; Slack/Discord/generic bridges cover it), 'send test' button (nice-to-have, follow-up if this PR gets too big).
